digest.component_or_area: autolander wipChain state machine + FFO TOCTOU re-drive
propositions: A single in-flight wipChain record serializes the loop so no two changes rebase onto the same HEAD concurrently, tracking phase and re_drive_count.
The wipChain phase is restricted to {selecting, rebasing, awaiting_verified, submitting, idle, paused}, where paused is the S5 emergency-stop.
Gerrit's native submittable flag requires descendant-of-tip per ADR-0040 but does not distinguish behind-tip from failing votes.
A FFO TOCTOU guard re-confirms the tested tree is still submittable immediately before POST /submit and refuses to submit if main advanced or any tested SHA changed.
On a TOCTOU mismatch or 'not fast-forward' refusal the same wipChain is re-driven (rebase to new tip, await fresh Verified, re-check) at most N=5 times.
After re-drive exhaustion the change is handed back by removing Autosubmit from every stack member, posting a needs_rebase Gerrit comment, and writing S3's needs_rebase marker.
